newsitems.title: Judgment Version 1.12
newsitems.author: ATLUS West
newsitems.contents:
Hello Judgment fans!

We've got some several fixes with this patch, please take a look at our patch notes. Please continue to post any issues you encounter here and thank you for playing!

Changes: [list]
[*] Updated to Intel XeSS 1.1 
[*] Addresses an issue with first boot presets not being applied on AMD Radeon RX 7000 series cards 
[*] Addressed an issue with graphics drawing incorrectly on Intel Arc machines[/list]

newsitems.title: Minimum Requirements Update (Windows 10 Users)
newsitems.author: [SEGA] David
newsitems.contents:
Hello Judgment fans,

We’ve recently updated the minimum requirements for this title with additional information for Windows 10 users.

The following versions of Windows 10 are now required in order to play: 

• Judgment - Windows 10 1703 (OS Build 15063) or Later

newsitems.title: New Graphics Options and Bug Fixes!
newsitems.author: SEGA_Bryant
newsitems.contents:
Hello RGG fans! 

We've got updates and several fixes with this patch, please see our patch notes below.  Please continue to post any issues you encounter here. Thank you for playing!  

[b]DLSS support is now fully supported for Judgment! 
[/b]
	• NVIDIA DLSS , NVIDIA DLSS Sharpness are now available under Graphic Settings > Detailed Settings 
	• NVIDIA DLAA been added under Graphic Settings > Detailed Settings

The following settings have been changed for first boot on SteamDeck
	• FSR is now off and FSR2.1 is now active 
	• FPS is now 60 

[b]Other fixes:
[/b]When playing darts outside of a 16:9 aspect ratio, the mini-screen in the bottom left no longer changes unexpectedly.

newsitems.contents:
Hello RGG fans!
